## Environment

- **Component**: [ ] Python backend / [ ] Frontend / [ ] MCP / [ ] Telegram bot / [ ] Docker
- **OS**: <macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11>
- **Python version**: `python --version`
- **Node version**: `node --version`
- **pnpm version**: `pnpm --version`
- **Commit / version**: <sha or tag>
- **Provider(s) in use**: <openai / anthropic / google / ...>
- **Deployment**: [ ] Local / [ ] Docker / [ ] Vercel / [ ] Other

## Severity

- [ ] Critical — prod down, data loss, security exposure
- [ ] High — major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] Medium — feature degraded, workaround exists
- [ ] Low — cosmetic or edge case
